pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script creates project with identifier 'office-renovation'
task description and setup_task.sh specify moving to 'MEP' category
task description and setup_task.sh specify removing 'Plumbing' and 'Electrical'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic project named 'Office Renovation' with identifier 'office-renovation'. The categories 'Plumbing' and 'Electrical' are removed and their issues are reassigned to the 'MEP' category.
